ApplicationSetting.title: ApplicationSetting
ApplicationSetting.description: Stores global configuration settings for the application, typically a single record per user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ApplicationSetting entity. (e.g., 'business_profile')

businessName.description: The legal name of the business using the application.

businessAddress.description: The physical address of the business.

businessTaxId.description: The tax identification number (e.g., RUC in Peru) of the business.

defaultCurrencyCode.description: The ISO 4217 code for the default currency (e.g., 'PEN' for Sol peruano).

currencySymbol.description: The symbol for the default currency (e.g., 'S/').

logoUrl.description: URL to the business logo, used for receipts and branding.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the application settings were last updated.

ProductCategory.title: ProductCategory
ProductCategory.description: Categorizes products for better organization and reporting.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ProductCategory entity.

name.description: The name of the product category (e.g., 'Bebidas', 'Lácteos').

description.description: A brief description of the product category.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Details about a specific product available for sale or purchase.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Product entity.

description.description: A detailed description of the product.

price.description: The selling price of the product per unit or kilogram.

stock.description: The current quantity of the product in stock. Only relevant if trackStock is true.

minStock.description: The minimum stock level before a product is considered to be low in stock.

trackStock.description: If true, stock levels are tracked for this product.

unitOfMeasure.description: The unit of measure for the product (e.g., 'unit', 'kg', 'liter').

imageUrl.description: URL to an image of the product.

color.description: A hex color code associated with the product for UI identification.

barcode.description: The barcode or SKU of the product for quick identification.

isActive.description: Indicates if the product is currently active and available for sale.

supplierId.description: Reference to the Supplier this product is associated with.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the product record was last updated.

Customer.title: Customer
Customer.description: Holds information about a client who purchases products or services.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Customer entity.

firstName.description: The first name of the customer.

lastName.description: The last name of the customer.

companyName.description: The company name if the customer represents a business.

email.description: The email address of the customer.

phone.description: The phone number of the customer.

address.description: The physical address of the customer.

identificationNumber.description: The national identification number (e.g., DNI, RUC) of the customer.

notes.description: Any additional notes or comments about the customer.

allowCredit.description: Specifies if the customer is allowed to make purchases on credit.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the customer record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the customer record was last updated.

Sale.title: Sale
Sale.description: Represents a single sales transaction or order made by a customer.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Sale entity.

saleNumber.description: A unique, human-readable sales or invoice number for the transaction.

saleDate.description: The date and time when the sale occurred.

customerId.description: Reference to Customer who made the purchase. (Relationship: Customer 1:N Sale)

totalAmount.description: The grand total amount of the sale, including discounts and taxes.

paymentMethod.description: The method of payment for the sale.

discountAmount.description: The total discount applied to the sale.

taxAmount.description: The total tax amount applied to the sale.

status.description: The current status of the sale (e.g., 'Pending', 'Completed', 'Cancelled', 'Partially Paid').

currencyCode.description: The ISO 4217 currency code for the sale (e.g., 'PEN', 'USD').

notes.description: Any additional notes related to the sale.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the sale record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the sale record was last updated.

SaleItem.title: SaleItem
SaleItem.description: Represents a single product line item within a sale.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SaleItem entity.

saleId.description: Reference to the Sale this item belongs to. (Relationship: Sale 1:N SaleItem)

productId.description: Reference to the Product being sold. (Relationship: Product 1:N SaleItem)

productName.description: Denormalized name of the product for display purposes.

quantity.description: The quantity of the product sold (can be units, kilograms, etc. based on product's unitOfMeasure).

unitPrice.description: The price of the product per unit or kilogram at the time of sale.

subtotal.description: The calculated subtotal for this line item (quantity * unitPrice).

unitOfMeasure.description: The unit of measure for the product (e.g., 'unit', 'kg').

notes.description: Any specific notes for this sale item.

Payment.title: Payment
Payment.description: Records a payment made by a customer against a specific sale.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Payment entity.

saleId.description: Reference to the Sale this payment is associated with. (Relationship: Sale 1:N Payment)

paymentDate.description: The date and time when the payment was made.

amount.description: The amount of the payment received.

paymentMethod.description: The method used for the payment (e.g., 'Cash', 'Credit Card', 'Bank Transfer').

transactionReference.description: A reference number or ID from the payment processor or bank, if applicable.

notes.description: Any additional notes regarding the payment.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the payment record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the payment record was last updated.

TransactionDocument.title: TransactionDocument
TransactionDocument.description: Stores metadata about generated transaction documents like receipts, invoices, or purchase orders.

id.description: Unique identifier for the TransactionDocument entity.

documentNumber.description: A unique number or identifier for the document.

issueDate.description: The date and time when the document was issued or generated.

saleId.description: Reference to the Sale entity if this document is related to a sale. (Relationship: Sale 1:N TransactionDocument)

paymentId.description: Reference to the Payment entity if this document is related to a payment. (Relationship: Payment 1:N TransactionDocument)

filePath.description: The URL or path to the stored document file (e.g., PNG file).

description.description: A brief description of the document's content or purpose.

status.description: The current status of the document (e.g., 'Generated', 'Sent', 'Printed', 'Archived').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the document record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the document record was last updated.

CustomerPayment.title: CustomerPayment
CustomerPayment.description: Records a payment received from a customer, independent of any specific sale, to pay down their balance.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CustomerPayment entity.

customerId.description: Reference to the Customer this payment is from.

Supplier.title: Supplier
Supplier.description: Represents a supplier or vendor from whom products are purchased.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Supplier entity.

contactPerson.description: The name of the primary contact person at the supplier.

email.description: The email address of the supplier.

phone.description: The phone number of the supplier.

address.description: The physical address of the supplier.

identificationNumber.description: The tax or business identification number (e.g., RUC) of the supplier.

notes.description: Any additional notes about the supplier.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the supplier record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the supplier record was last updated.

Purchase.title: Purchase
Purchase.description: Represents a single purchase transaction from a supplier.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Purchase entity.

purchaseNumber.description: A unique, human-readable number for the purchase transaction.

purchaseDate.description: The date and time when the purchase was made.

supplierId.description: Reference to the Supplier from whom the purchase was made.

totalAmount.description: The grand total amount of the purchase.

currencyCode.description: The ISO 4217 currency code for the purchase.

notes.description: Any additional notes related to the purchase.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the purchase record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the purchase record was last updated.

PurchaseItem.title: PurchaseItem
PurchaseItem.description: Represents a single product line item within a purchase.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PurchaseItem entity.

purchaseId.description: Reference to the Purchase this item belongs to.

productId.description: Reference to the Product being purchased.

quantity.description: The quantity of the product purchased.

unitCost.description: The cost of the product per unit or kilogram.

subtotal.description: The calculated subtotal for this line item (quantity * unitCost).

unitOfMeasure.description: The unit of measure for the product.

SupplierPayment.title: SupplierPayment
SupplierPayment.description: Records a payment made to a supplier.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SupplierPayment entity.

supplierId.description: Reference to the Supplier this payment is for.

ApprovedUser.title: ApprovedUser
ApprovedUser.description: Represents a user who has been granted access to the application by an administrator. The document ID is the user's UID.

approvedAt.description: Timestamp when the user was approved.

UserKey.title: UserKey
UserKey.description: Stores a unique license key generated for a user upon registration.

key.description: The unique license key for the user (e.g., 'EVA-XXXX-XXXXXXXX').

email.description: The email of the user this key belongs to.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the key was generated.

definition.description: User-specific application settings, like business name and logo. The settingId is a fixed value like 'business_profile'.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication User ID of the business owner.

params.name: settingId
params.description: The unique identifier for the setting document, e.g., 'business_profile'.

definition.description: A collection that stores the UIDs of users who are approved to use the application. Only an admin can write to this collection.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication User ID of the approved user.

definition.description: Stores the unique license key for a user. The keyId is a fixed value like 'user_license'.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication User ID.

params.name: keyId
params.description: The unique identifier for the key document, e.g., 'user_license'.

definition.description: Product categories specific to a user's business. Authorization is based on the 'userId' in the path, ensuring only the owner can access their categories.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication User ID of the business owner.

params.name: productCategoryId
params.description: The unique identifier for the product category.

definition.description: Products available for a user's business. Authorization is based on the 'userId' in the path.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication User ID of the business owner.

params.name: productId
params.description: The unique identifier for the product.

definition.description: Customers of a user's business. Authorization is based on the 'userId' in the path.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication User ID of the business owner.

params.name: customerId
params.description: The unique identifier for the customer.

definition.description: Sales transactions for a user's business. Authorization is based on the 'userId' in the path.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication User ID of the business owner.

params.name: saleId
params.description: The unique identifier for the sale transaction.

definition.description: Line items belonging to a specific sale. Authorization is inherited from the parent 'saleId' and 'userId' in the path, ensuring atomic rule evaluation.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication User ID of the business owner.

params.name: saleId
params.description: The unique identifier for the parent sale transaction.

params.name: saleItemId
params.description: The unique identifier for the sale item.

definition.description: Payments made towards a specific sale. Authorization is inherited from the parent 'saleId' and 'userId' in the path.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication User ID of the business owner.

params.name: saleId
params.description: The unique identifier for the parent sale transaction.

params.name: paymentId
params.description: The unique identifier for the payment.

definition.description: Generated transaction documents (receipts, invoices) for a user's business. Includes denormalized 'ownerId' (matching 'userId' from the path) for explicit authorization independence and flexible referencing to sales, payments, or purchases.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication User ID of the business owner.

params.name: documentId
params.description: The unique identifier for the transaction document.

definition.description: Payments received from a customer to pay down their total balance. Authorization is based on the 'userId' in the path.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication User ID of the business owner.

params.name: paymentId
params.description: The unique identifier for the customer payment.

definition.description: Suppliers for a user's business. Authorization is based on the 'userId' in the path.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication User ID of the business owner.

params.name: supplierId
params.description: The unique identifier for the supplier.

definition.description: Purchase transactions for a user's business. Authorization is based on the 'userId' in the path.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication User ID of the business owner.

params.name: purchaseId
params.description: The unique identifier for the purchase transaction.

definition.description: Line items belonging to a specific purchase.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication User ID.

params.name: purchaseId
params.description: The unique identifier for the parent purchase transaction.

params.name: purchaseItemId
params.description: The unique identifier for the purchase item.

definition.description: Payments made to a supplier. Authorization is based on the 'userId' in the path.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication User ID.

params.name: paymentId
params.description: The unique identifier for the supplier payment.

firestore.reasoning: The recommended Firestore structure is designed to be highly secure, scalable, and multi-tenant. The core strategy involves segregating all business-specific data under a dedicated user-ID path (`/users/{userId}/...`). This ensures that each user's business data (products, sales, customers, settings) is isolated, making security rules straightforward and highly efficient. Authorization for these collections relies on `request.auth.uid == userId`. For true multi-tenancy, business-specific settings (like name and logo) are stored in `/users/{userId}/settings/{settingId}`, where `{settingId}` is a fixed document ID like `business_profile`.
